goal: Build a mixed-SKU palletizer: a Franka Panda picks 3 differently-sized cubes (5cm, 8cm, 10cm) from a conveyor and places each at a designated grid slot on a 0.30×0.30m pallet. Drop z is computed per cube size (= pallet_top + cube_size/2). Demonstrates that compute_stack_placement's spacing doesn't have to be uniform across SKUs — agent computes positions individually then composes a drop_targets dict with custom z per cube.
thoughts:
Six mixed-SKU specifics for CP-12 (extends CP-08 — same pallet, robot, conveyor pattern; only difference is per-cube size + drop position):
1) Cube sizes: Cube_1 = 0.05m (small), Cube_2 = 0.08m, Cube_3 = 0.10m. Each cube's center starts at z = belt_top(0.81) + cube_size/2.
2) Cubes spaced 0.40m on conveyor (vs CP-01's 0.25m) — larger spacing accommodates 10cm cube without overlap.
3) Pallet 0.30×0.30×0.05m at [0, -0.4, 0.775]. Top z=0.80. Slot positions: Cube_1 at (-0.10, -0.50), Cube_2 at (0, -0.40 — center), Cube_3 at (0.10, -0.30). Spaced 0.10m + cube radius safety.
4) Drop z per cube: 0.80 + cube_size/2. So Cube_1→0.825, Cube_2→0.840, Cube_3→0.850. Each cube center at correct height for its size.
5) Controller uses CP-08's drop_targets pattern. _bin_drop_pos(cube_path) reads custom per-cube z from DROP_TARGETS dict. cuRobo handler doesn't need cube_size knowledge — drop_target encodes it.
6) compute_stack_placement v3 (2026-05-08) supports per-cube cube_sizes via `cube_sizes=[0.05, 0.08, 0.10]`. The hardcoded drop_targets in CP-12 match what compute_stack_placement(target='/World/Pallet', pattern='grid_3x1', n_items=3, cube_sizes=[0.05,0.08,0.10], spacing=0.15, anchor='top') yields. Canonical executor's two-phase capture pattern still prevents inline tool composition — agent invokes the tool at canonical-author time.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + parent Xform + table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 3 cubes with different sizes, spaced 0.40m on conveyor.
# Each cube center at z = belt_top + cube_size/2 (so it sits ON belt).
# belt top = 0.78 + 0.025 = 0.805 → cube z = 0.805 + cube_size/2
# Cube_1 (5cm): z = 0.83, Cube_2 (8cm): z = 0.845, Cube_3 (10cm): z = 0.855
cube_specs = [
    ("/World/Cube_1", -1.4,  0.05),
    ("/World/Cube_2", -1.0,  0.08),
    ("/World/Cube_3", -0.6,  0.10),
]
for path, x, sz in cube_specs:
    z = 0.805 + sz * 0.5
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, z], size=sz)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[c[0] for c in cube_specs],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for c in cube_specs:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=c[0], material_name="rubber")

# Pallet 0.30x0.30x0.05m
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pallet", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.15, 0.15, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pallet", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# drop_targets per cube — distinct grid slot + z that accounts for cube size.
# Pallet top z = 0.80. Cube_N drop z = 0.80 + cube_size/2.
# Slot xy placement: 3 across pallet at y=-0.50, -0.40, -0.30 (0.10m apart).
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1", "/World/Cube_2", "/World/Cube_3"],
    destination_path="/World/Pallet",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Cube_1": [-0.10, -0.50, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_2": [ 0.00, -0.40, 0.840],
        "/World/Cube_3": [ 0.10, -0.30, 0.850],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Pallet"],
)
extension_notes: CP-12 demonstrates per-cube drop-z customization for non-uniform item sizes — an important variant for real palletizing of mixed SKUs. Future extensions: (a) compute_stack_placement v3 with cube_sizes as list (compute slot positions accounting for footprint variance); (b) per-cube spacing tuning; (c) SKU-class-specific pallets.
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + parent Xform + table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size={{workpieces[0].size}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size={{workpieces[1].size}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size={{workpieces[2].size}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_prim(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{primary_destination.position}}, scale={{primary_destination.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{workpieces[0].path}}: {{workpieces[0].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[1].path}}: {{workpieces[1].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[2].path}}: {{workpieces[2].drop_target}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
failure_modes: Cube_2 + Cube_3 collision during pickup — bigger cubes need more clearance from gripper. Default ParallelGripper opens to 4cm; 10cm cube doesn't fit between fingers. Robot needs to grip the SIDE (≤4cm-wide face) — Franka may fail on cubic 10cm shape.
Drop z incorrect — Cube_3 (10cm) at drop_z=0.850 means cube center 5cm above pallet top, cube bottom flush at 0.80. Correct.

Slot xy collision between adjacent cubes after placement — Cube_1 (5cm) at (-0.10, -0.50) and Cube_2 (8cm) at (0, -0.40) → centers 0.10√2 = 0.14m apart. Cube radii sum: 2.5cm + 4cm = 6.5cm. 14cm > 6.5cm. No collision.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (multi-cube cube_paths + Mode A 3-strike fix)
